title: RODSchema Weapons Schema (v1, stats-only)
description: Keys are real ItemKey values (e.g. ItemName_WOS_1). RODSchema resolves ItemKey -> numeric ID against the live RODItemDataAsset at boot, then patches the matching TMap entry in place. Mesh/visual fields are NOT supported in v1 -- see README 'Known limitations'.

Category.description: Which weapon category map to look in. Optional if the ItemKey's prefix (WOS/WRA/WDA/WMA/WTS/WAX) unambiguously identifies it -- RODSchema infers it from the prefix when omitted, but you can set this explicitly if you're ever unsure.

CopyStatsFrom.description: Convenience field: copy WeaponAttack, Grade, Class, ModNames, WeaponTypeID, WeaponStrikeType, and the full enhancement curve (BaseWeaponATK[] + AbilityCorrectionRank arrays) from another real ItemKey in the SAME category, in one step. Applied first; any fields you also set explicitly below override the copied values.

WeaponAttack.description: Base ATK at +0 enhancement. Confirmed real field.

Grade.description: Item grade/tier, confirmed real field (Shortsword=1, Death's Salvation=5).

Class.description: Displayed rank badge. CONFIRMED LIMITATION: direct standalone overrides of this field are not supported in this build (CastField<FEnumProperty> fails to compile against this specific RE-UE4SS build's reimplemented property classes). Using CopyStatsFrom to copy a full stat block (including Class) from another weapon works fine and is unaffected -- only an explicit standalone override of just this one field, outside CopyStatsFrom, doesn't work yet.

ModNames.description: Unique MOD key(s) attached to this weapon, e.g. 'SoulBite'. Confirmed real field -- note the numeric EFFECT for a given ModName is looked up elsewhere (DA_AttributeModification) and is NOT redefined here; you're only changing which mod key this weapon points at.

WeaponStrikeType.description: Confirmed enum on the struct; exact full value set not exhaustively verified beyond what's seen in this export -- if the game rejects a value here, check UE4SS.log for the real enum's other entries.

Enhancement.description: Patches the SEPARATE per-ID entry in the category's *EnhancementDataAsMap. Omit to leave the enhancement curve untouched (e.g. if you only used CopyStatsFrom, which already copies this).

BaseWeaponATK.description: 21-entry array, one ATK value per enhancement tier (+0 through +20). Confirmed real field.
